key.name: show-indicator
key.description: Toggle the MacTop indicator visibility.

key.name: app-blacklist
key.description: List of app names, IDs, or WM classes to hide from the menu bar.

key.name: menu-icon
key.description: Icon for the system menu (position 0). Leave empty to auto-detect from your distro. Select "Apple" to use the Apple logo.

key.name: lock-to-focused-app
key.description: When enabled, the app menu stays locked to the currently focused app even when hovering over the panel. The menu only changes when you switch to a different window or show the desktop.

key.name: show-os-icon
key.description: Show the OS logo icon in the top panel. When hidden, the menu is still accessible but the icon is not displayed.

key.name: show-user-switcher
key.description: Show the user switcher button in the top panel for fast user switching. Only visible when multiple user accounts exist.

key.name: user-switcher-display-mode
key.description: What to show in the user switcher button: 'icon' (user avatar), 'username' (text label), or 'both'.

key.name: spotlight-show-panel-icon
key.description: Show a search icon in the top panel to toggle Spotlight search overlay.

key.name: spotlight-keybinding
key.description: Global keyboard shortcut to toggle Spotlight search overlay.

key.name: spotlight-blur-background
key.description: Apply a blurred background effect to the Spotlight overlay. Requires imagemagick to be installed.

key.name: spotlight-theme
key.description: Color theme for the Spotlight overlay ('light' or 'dark').

key.name: spotlight-use-animations
key.description: Enable smooth open/close animations for the Spotlight overlay.

key.name: spotlight-animation-speed
key.description: Duration in milliseconds for open/close animations.

key.name: spotlight-background-color
key.description: Background color as [r, g, b, a] with values 0.0-1.0.

key.name: spotlight-scale-width
key.description: Width scaling factor for the overlay.

key.name: spotlight-scale-height
key.description: Height scaling factor for the overlay.

key.name: spotlight-entry-font-size
key.description: Entry font size index (0=auto, 1=16, 2=18, 3=20, 4=22, 5=24).

key.name: spotlight-text-color
key.description: Text color as [r, g, b, a]. Alpha 0 means auto-detect from background.

key.name: spotlight-entry-text-color
key.description: Entry text color as [r, g, b, a]. Alpha 0 means auto-detect.

key.name: spotlight-panel-icon-color
key.description: Panel icon color as [r, g, b, a].

key.name: spotlight-window-effect
key.description: Window effect type (0=none, 1=tint, 2=monochrome, 3=blur).

key.name: spotlight-window-effect-color
key.description: Window effect color as [r, g, b, a].

key.name: spotlight-preferred-monitor
key.description: Preferred monitor index (0=auto/primary).

key.name: spotlight-popup-at-cursor-monitor
key.description: When enabled, spotlight appears on the monitor where the cursor is.

key.name: spotlight-border-thickness
key.description: Border thickness in pixels (0=none).

key.name: spotlight-border-color
key.description: Border color as [r, g, b, a].

key.name: spotlight-blur-sigma
key.description: Blur sigma for background blur effect.

key.name: spotlight-blur-brightness
key.description: Brightness for background blur effect.
